step_rationale: Long-chain ncRNA regulating immune-cell differentiation and vascular inflammation in atherosclerosis.
mechanism: MALAT1 regulates inflammatory immune-cell recruitment and atherosclerotic plaque development.

references.title: A novel circulating biomarker lnc-MALAT1 for acute myocardial infarction: Its relationship with disease risk, features, cytokines, and major adverse cardiovascular events.
Immune system-mediated atherosclerosis caused by deficiency of long non-coding RNA MALAT1 in ApoE-/-mice.
